title: Venture
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Venture|the [[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]}}
The '''''Venture''''' was an [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

After commissioning shortly before [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], ''Venture'' entered the inaugural [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]] under the command of [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Tolsk]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Logirth]] as the flagship of [[Task Force Blackvine]]. It participated at the [[Battle of Doornik-319]], where it lost fourteen [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and took damage along three portside starfighter hangar bays. Afterward, the ''Venture'' participated in the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

The pilots of [[Bravo Flight (New Republic)|Bravo Flight]] were stationed aboard the ''Venture''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
